group_1.textLeft: Come now, we have a ritual to do...@That is justice...
The people of the East aren't bad...
We just thought they were bad...

group_1.textRight: [chara:300400:effect_emotion_surprise_0][se:7226_shock]...?!

group_1.textLeft: It's only natural to want to attack the bad guy...@I just wanted justice...
All I wanted was an easy target to lash at...
So make it easy for me now.@Let me finish...the ritual...

group_1.textRight: (...I can't empathize with him at all...)
(But, I used to...have some similarities to this guy.)
(My wish to become a knight was granted,@and I became a Magical Girl...)
(...trying to deliver justice with impure motives.)
(But afterwards I met Asuka@and the Magical Girl community.)

group_1.narration: What I had lost...@...No, what I forgotten.
The [textRed:knight] in the picture book saved people honestly.

group_1.textLeft: All right, that's it! No more thinking for me!

group_1.textRight: (I came to my senses... And didn't lose my way...)
(But if, if I hadn't become a Magical Girl,)
(I never would have met Asuka and everyone@in all their different schools and grades.)
(The desires I held so tightly would have just@swelled up...and stayed that way...)
(I might...have become just like you.)

group_1.textLeft: I'm scared of that girl...@So I started to like the same things...
I started to hate the same things...@So like her, I came to hate the East...

group_1.textRight: How could you...!
[chara:101300:effect_emotion_surprise_0][se:7226_shock]...?!

group_1.textLeft: I'm weak...I have no choice but to go along@with the stronger kids in class...
Living weakly...@Just to hurt people I don't even know...
That's why I also joined this group...@In this ritual circle...

group_1.textRight: ("Because I'm weak," she said...)
(Just from what I've already heard@of this lady's grievances...)
(What vileness! Utterly shameful!)
(I cannot sympathize with her in the slightest...)
(Though I suppose I can only say that...)
(..."because I am strong...")
(I've trained since I was little and became@a Magical Girl during my adolescence.)
(Strength brought about by arrogance...)
(If I had been born into a normal family,)
(and was not a Magical Girl,@but just a normal, weak human...)
(I kinda get how she feels too.)
(Nowadays, when kids in class make fun of me,)
(I don't think anything of it, but...)
(Until a while ago...)
(Just the kids in class gossiping about me)
(was enough to bring out my Doppel...)

group_1.textLeft: Maybe it's the same Doppel crap I went through@a while ago.
Was it hard to handle?@I'm glad you returned safely...

group_1.textRight: I came back when I heard Myako-senpai's voice.
So seriously, thank you.
(I was able to overcome that...)
(Because I became a Magical Girl,@with reliable seniors to turn to,)
(and because I have amazing friends@outside of class, too...)
(If I hadn't become a Magical Girl,@I'm sure I'd have spent my youth)
(worrying how everyone in class looks at me...)
I might also...

group_1.textCenter: Be the same as you...@(Be just like you.)
